title: MARKO Operations
subtitle: Centralized content operations platform with AI-powered semantic retrieval.
about:
What is MARKO?

Digital creators and agencies suffer from scattered assets across cloud drives, notion boards, and messaging apps. MARKO acts as a single pane of glass aggregating media workflows.

challenge.title: The Challenge: Manual data chaos in content delivery
challenge.description: Scaling content creation teams requires tight review loops. Managing raw footage approvals, script versions, and finals across fragmented channels caused missed deadlines.

cards.title: Desynced Teams
cards.description: Editors and Producers lacked a unified temporal view of project progress.

cards.title: Lost Assets
cards.description: Digging through 100s of gigabytes of raw video files to find B-Roll costs hours.

cards.title: Slow Iteration
cards.description: Manual transcription and tagging workflows were entirely unscalable.

solution.title: Our Solution: AI-First Asset Infrastructure
solution.description: We centralized the entire workflow, replacing manual folders with a completely synced temporal database paired with LLM agents.

features.title: Semantic Video Search
features.description: Deep integrations with OpenRouter and Qwen allow editors to search for content naturally.

features.title: Real-time Synchronization
features.description: Changes propagate to all connected clients instantly via Supabase WebSockets.

features.title: Multi-platform Composer
features.description: Unified dashboard to draft and preview content across multiple target social algorithms.

techStack.title: Our Tech-Stack: AI & Edge Compute
techStack.description: Leveraging cutting edge models to handle vast amounts of unstructured text and video heuristics.

categories.name: AI Orchestration
categories.description: OpenRouter aggregating LLM calls with optimized latency bridging to Qwen for complex reasoning tasks.

categories.name: Backend
categories.description: Supabase delivering edge-ready auth, instantaneous realtime database sync, and deep bucket storage.

results.title: Instant Semantic Retrieval
results.description: Reduced search times for old assets from hours to sub-seconds.

results.title: Unified Operations
results.description: Brought the entire publishing lifecycle into a single centralized web application.
